reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Culiplan
reauth_confirm.description: Your Culiplan session has expired. Click Submit to re-authenticate.

abort.oauth_unauthorized: OAuth authorization error while obtaining access token.
abort.missing_configuration: The component is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.wrong_account: The authenticated Culiplan account does not match the existing entry. Re-authenticate with the same account or remove the entry and add the new account.

data_description.expiry_days: Items expiring within this many days are counted by the expiring_pantry_items sensor.
data_description.expiry_hours: Items expiring within this many hours cause the pantry_has_expiring binary sensor to turn on.
